channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former DOJ Prosecutor Joins Don Lemon's Defense Team
item.description: A former top federal prosecutor who resigned last month from the U.S. Attorney's Office in Minnesota has joined the legal team of former CNN anchor Do...

item.title: Breaking the Fourth Wall: Left-wing groups defiant as GOP sheds light on groups tied to China
item.description: A top GOP House committee chairman exposed "malign foreign influence" during a Tuesday hearing, but the groups under scrutiny did not retreat or apolo...

item.title: Rep. Fine to Newsmax: Super Bowl Halftime Show Pushed Drugs, Profanity
item.description: Rep. Randy Fine, R-Fla., said Tuesday on Newsmax that the National Football League and NBC should face accountability after Bad Bunny's Super Bowl LX ...

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Israeli Team Robbed - Olympic Officials Still Have Not Learned from Atlanta and Munich

item.description: North Carolina Republican state Rep. Allen Chesser said he was taken by surprise when a Democratic sheriff could not answer a basic question about how...

item.title: The surprising reason why Americans could face high beef prices for years
item.description: America's cattle herd has shrunk to its smallest size in 75 years due to drought, pushing beef prices to near-record highs with no quick relief in sig...

item.title: Grand jury rejects DOJ effort to indict Democratic lawmakers who urged military to defy illegal orders
item.description: A grand jury refused to indict Democratic lawmakers who urged military members to ignore "illegal orders," dealing a blow to the Justice Department.

item.title: Grand Jury Declines to Indict Democrats Over Illegal Orders Video
item.description: Federal prosecutors failed to bring charges Tuesday against six Democrat lawmakers who urged service members to refuse illegal orders, outraging Presi...

item.title: Mamdani Blasted for Skipping Installation of N.Y. Archbishop

item.title: BREAKING: Person Detained in Guthrie Case Per FBI Sources
